LanguageData.Bullet_HellsphereCannonGun.label: hellsphere cannon shot
LanguageData.Gun_HellsphereCannon.label: hellsphere cannon
LanguageData.Gun_HellsphereCannon.description: A ultra-high-power energy pulse projector designed for siegebreaking. The hellsphere cannon must hold a bead on its target for several seconds while charging, before it releases a devastating tsunami of power. The explosion is capable of melting concrete in its blast radius. The heat of the explosion will ignite anything nearby. It cannot fire at close-up targets.
LanguageData.Gun_HellsphereCannon.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.TW_Gun_QueenChargeBlasterHeavy.label: War Queen Charge Blaster
LanguageData.TW_Gun_QueenChargeBlasterHeavy.descripti: A pulse-charged rapid-fire blaster designed for area suppression. Enhanced coolant systems enable sustained lethal fire. This specialized variant created for the War Queen represents a significant tactical upgrade over previous models.
